initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (r1.fastestLapSpeed - r2.fastestLapSpeed) * 100.0 / r2.fastestLapSpeed AS percent_faster
FROM results r1
JOIN drivers d1 ON r1.driverId = d1.driverId
JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
JOIN results r2 ON r1.driverId = r2.driverId
JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
WHERE d1.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta'
  AND ra1.round = 853
  AND ra2.round = 854
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (t1.fastestLapSpeed - t2.fastestLapSpeed) * 100.0 / t2.fastestLapSpeed AS percent_faster
FROM 
    (SELECT r.fastestLapSpeed
     FROM results r
     JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
     JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
     WHERE d.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta' AND ra.round = 853) t1,
    (SELECT r.fastestLapSpeed
     FROM results r
     JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
     JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
     WHERE d.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta' AND ra.round = 854) t2

SELECT 
  (t1.fastestLapSpeed - t2.fastestLapSpeed) * 100.0 / t2.fastestLapSpeed AS percent_faster
FROM 
  (SELECT r.fastestLapSpeed, ra.round
   FROM results r
   JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
   JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
   WHERE d.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta' AND ra.round = 853) t1,
  (SELECT r.fastestLapSpeed, ra.round
   FROM results r
   JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
   JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
   WHERE d.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta' AND ra.round = 854) t2
ORDER BY t1.round ASC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    (r1.fastestLapSpeed - r2.fastestLapSpeed) * 100.0 / r2.fastestLapSpeed AS percent_faster
FROM results r1
JOIN drivers d1 ON r1.driverId = d1.driverId
JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
JOIN results r2 ON r2.driverId = d1.driverId
JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
WHERE d1.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta'
  AND ra1.round = 853
  AND ra2.round = 854
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (r1.fastestLapSpeed - r2.fastestLapSpeed) * 100.0 / r2.fastestLapSpeed AS percent_faster
FROM 
    results r1
    JOIN drivers d1 ON r1.driverId = d1.driverId
    JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
    JOIN results r2 
        ON r2.driverId = d1.driverId 
        AND r2.raceId = (
            SELECT raceId 
            FROM races 
            WHERE round = 854
        )
WHERE 
    d1.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta'
    AND ra1.round = 853
    AND r1.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL
    AND r2.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    (r1.fastestLapSpeed - r2.fastestLapSpeed) * 100.0 / r2.fastestLapSpeed AS percent_faster
FROM 
    results r1
    JOIN drivers d1 ON r1.driverId = d1.driverId
    JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
    JOIN results r2 
        ON r2.driverId = d1.driverId 
        AND r2.raceId = (
            SELECT raceId 
            FROM races 
            WHERE round = 854
        )
WHERE 
    d1.driverRef = 'Paul di Resta'
    AND ra1.round = 853
    AND r1.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL
    AND r2.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL;
